mapper.select: SELECT tei.*, sf.file_id as file_id FROM esg.tb_equipment_info tei -- 파일 LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file sf on sf.target_id = tei.equipment_id and sf.target_type='equipment' WHERE 1=1 AND tei.comp_id = #{compId} ORDER BY tei.use_yn DESC, tei.ord_seq ASC --, tei.equipment_id DESC

SELECT tei.*, sf.file_id as file_id, tdt.std_eq_nm FROM esg.tb_equipment_info tei LEFT JOIN esg.tb_dataset_typeofequipment tdt ON tdt.std_eq_id = tei.std_eq_id AND tdt.comp_id = tei.comp_id -- 파일 LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file sf on sf.target_id = tei.equipment_id and sf.target_type='equipment' WHERE tei.equipment_id = #{searchText};
mapper.insert:
select to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || lpad( (coalesce(max(substring(equipment_id from 9 for 4))::int, 0) + 1)::text, 4, '0' ) as equipment_id from esg.tb_equipment_info where equipment_id like to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDD') || '%'
INSERT INTO esg.tb_equipment_info ( comp_id, equipment_id, equipment_nm, usage_type, setup_location, mgmt_num, mf_comp, mf_spec, mf_date, setup_at, discard_at, ord_seq, remark, created_at, created_by, use_yn, std_eq_id ) VALUES ( #{compId}, #{equipmentId}, #{equipmentNm}, #{usageType}, #{setupLocation}, #{mgmtNum}, #{mfComp}, #{mfSpec}, #{mfDate}, #{setupAt}, #{discardAt}, #{ordSeq}, #{remark}, now(), #{createdBy}, #{useYn}, #{stdEqId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_equipment_info SET equipment_nm = #{equipmentNm}, usage_type = #{usageType}, setup_location = #{setupLocation}, mgmt_num = #{mgmtNum}, mf_comp = #{mfComp}, mf_spec = #{mfSpec}, mf_date = #{mfDate}, setup_at = #{setupAt}, discard_at = #{discardAt}, ord_seq = #{ordSeq}, remark = #{remark}, use_yn = #{useYn}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy}, std_eq_id = #{stdEqId} WHERE equipment_id = #{equipmentId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM esg.tb_equipment_info WHERE 1=1 AND equipment_id = #{equipmentId}

SELECT tdt.std_eq_id, tdt.std_eq_nm, tdt.std_eq_eng_nm, tdt.std_eq_desc AS remark, tdt.ord_seq, tdt.use_yn FROM esg.tb_dataset_typeofEquipment tdt WHERE 1=1 AND comp_id = #{compId} ORDER BY use_yn DESC, ord_seq ASC, std_eq_id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_dataset_typeofequipment SET std_eq_nm = #{stdEqNm}, std_eq_eng_nm = #{stdEqEngNm}, std_eq_desc = #{remark}, ord_seq = #{ordSeq}, use_yn = #{useYn}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE comp_id = #{compId} AND std_eq_id = #{stdEqId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT CASE WHEN #{stdEqId} IS NULL OR #{stdEqId} = '' THEN to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || lpad((coalesce(max(substring(std_eq_id from 9 for 4))::int, 0) + 1)::text, 4, '0') ELSE #{stdEqId} END FROM esg.tb_dataset_typeofequipment WHERE std_eq_id LIKE to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || '%' AND comp_id = #{compId}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_dataset_typeofequipment ( comp_id, std_eq_id, std_eq_nm, std_eq_eng_nm, std_eq_desc, ord_seq, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{compId}, #{stdEqId}, #{stdEqNm}, #{stdEqEngNm}, #{remark}, #{ordSeq}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT tei.std_eq_id, t1.std_eq_nm as std_eq_nm FROM esg.tb_equipment_info tei LEFT JOIN esg.tb_dataset_typeofEquipment t1 ON tei.comp_id = t1.comp_id and tei.std_eq_id = t1.std_eq_id WHERE tei.comp_id = #{compId} GROUP BY tei.std_eq_id, t1.std_eq_nm
